## Plan: Design System Variables

### Context
This plan establishes a design variable foundation for the frontend. We will
define the color palette, typography scale, and Tailwind theme configuration.

### Tasks
| # | Task | Agent | Deliverable |
|---|------|-------|-------------|
| 1 | Define design variable set | web-designer | `src/variables.css` |
| 2 | Configure color palette | web-designer | `tailwind.config.ts` |
| 3 | Set up typography scale | frontend-engineer | `src/styles/type.css` |
